text: Hello. Hello. Hi. This is Samantha with U.S. medical supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. Okay. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. I get it in front of the VA every time. You have diabetes? Yes. But I get everything from the VA. Okay. I'm already set with that. Okay. Thank you. [BLANK_AUDIO]
